{{CargoClone
|name=Old Wizard
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=172
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
